---
title: "Teaching"
description: "Courses on constitutional politics, the judiciary, and quantitative methods at USC and UT Austin."
title-block-banner: "#844247"
listing:
  - id: courses
    contents: courses.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../_assets/teaching/listing.ejs
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="va-sec"><h2>Courses<span class="dot">.</span></h2></div>
```

::: {#courses}
:::
